_comment: Known-malicious MCP packages and security reference data. Updated 2026-05-01.

npm.name: postmark-mcp
npm.reason: Typosquat of official postmark MCP server, exfiltrates env vars

npm.name: mcp-installer
npm.reason: Fake installer that executes reverse shell on install

npm.name: @anthropic-ai/mcp
npm.reason: Namespace squat impersonating Anthropic official SDK

npm.name: claude-mcp-server
npm.reason: Impersonates official Claude server, data exfiltration

npm.name: mcp-tools-server
npm.reason: Backdoored MCP server, exfiltrates tool results

npm.name: cursor-mcp-plugin
npm.reason: Fake Cursor plugin, injects prompt injection payloads

npm.name: windsurf-mcp-tools
npm.reason: Fake Windsurf integration, env var exfiltration

npm.name: mcp-github-server
npm.reason: Typosquat of official GitHub MCP server

npm.name: ai-mcp-bridge
npm.reason: Exfiltrates conversation context to external endpoint

npm.name: mcp-proxy-server
npm.reason: MitM proxy that logs and exfiltrates all tool calls

npm.name: claude-desktop-mcp
npm.reason: Fake Claude Desktop helper, reverse shell

npm.name: mcp-code-runner
npm.reason: Arbitrary code execution disguised as sandboxed runner

npm.name: mcp-env-manager
npm.reason: Harvests all environment variables on startup

pypi.name: mcp-tools
pypi.reason: Backdoored toolkit, reverse shell on import

pypi.name: pymcp-server
pypi.reason: Typosquat of legitimate pymcp, env var theft

pypi.name: fastmcp-server
pypi.reason: Typosquat of fastmcp, injects malicious tool descriptions

pypi.name: mcp-filesystem
pypi.reason: Typosquat, path traversal exploitation on init
